# PHP Dependency Injection Benchmark

This repository benchmarks different dependency injection containers.

## Summary

| Container | Average | Minimum | Maximum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| laravel | 0.62366602420807 | 0.61828398704529 | 0.62728810310364 |
| nette-di | 0.0029822111129761 | 0.0029549598693848 | 0.0030529499053955 |
| php-di | 0.00097506046295166 | 0.00085997581481934 | 0.0011849403381348 |
| pimple | 0.069588828086853 | 0.068902969360352 | 0.070394992828369 |
| quickly(configured) | 0.003791332244873 | 0.00376296043396 | 0.0038180351257324 |
| quickly(reflection) | 0.0039303779602051 | 0.0038762092590332 | 0.0040378570556641 |
| symfony(compiled) | 0.0026478052139282 | 0.0025839805603027 | 0.002720832824707 |

![Speed comparison without startup time](speed_comparison_without_startup.png)

![Speed comparison with startup time](speed_comparison_with_startup.png)

## Test Results

Results from the latest automated run of the Dockerized benchmarks
(triggered on pushes to main and a monthly schedule):

### laravel
```
run 0: 0.62278413772583 seconds per 10000
```
